# SilkWheel 0.1.0 beta 1

First public beta release.

## Highlights

- System-wide smooth mouse wheel scrolling on Windows 10/11.
- Tray app with enable/pause and settings access.
- A/B/native profile comparison.
- Per-app exclusion list.
- Light, gray, dark, and custom themes.
- Chinese and English UI.
- Local settings only; no telemetry.

## Beta Model

SilkWheel is currently a free beta. Use it for 21 days. After that, share one real feedback note to keep using the current beta version.

## Download

Download the Windows x64 ZIP from this release, extract it, and run `SilkWheel.exe`.

## Known Notes

- This beta is not code-signed yet, so Windows or browsers may show warnings.
- The scroll feel is still being tuned. Feedback about mouse model, app, and profile is especially useful.
- Some apps may need to be added to the exclusion list if they already implement custom scrolling behavior.

## Feedback

- Website: https://silkwheel.raymondstudio.cn/#feedback
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/RaymondGuoCGI/SilkWheel/issues
- Public feedback repo: https://github.com/RaymondGuoCGI/SilkWheel-Feedback/issues
